scripts.rift:gate: pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm --filter rift-next-shadcn-example rift:from-code
scripts.ci:example: pnpm lint:example && pnpm build:example && pnpm rift:example:from-code && (git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && git diff --exit-code -- examples/rift-next-shadcn-example/.rift/designrules.yaml || echo "Skipping git diff: not a git repository")
